Fit the marginal (no-borrowing) group model

Source: R/route-c.R
dot-fit_group_model_marginal.Rd

One left-censored GAM per target analyte (lv ~ s(PC1) + ... on detected observations), with NO shared factor. Uses mgcv only – no brms, no cmdstanr. The "borrowing" the factor model attempts is skipped entirely, so this is the robust choice on panels where cross-analyte correlation is weak or ragged (sparse analytes' spurious loadings can't mis-condition anything).

Usage

.fit_group_model_marginal(
  target_analytes,
  safe_analytes,
  base,
  pc_wide,
  pc_cols,
  log_floors,
  group_name = "group"
)

Developed by Robin Shannon.
